reason: Resolved three merge conflicts from git merge origin/main into PR #55. Took origin/main's side in every case because HEAD's variant referenced symbols removed by main's recent refactors (useDuties hook, legacy/markdown fields, FOLDER_DIRS, listFolderDutiesInDir, setRunning state, Play icon, Run mutation). Main's refactor reorganized the dashboard to a 2x2 grid (Goals/Channels/Reports/Engine) without the DutiesHealth card, switched the executables list to a master/detail pattern with ExecutableRow, and simplified listExecutableFiles to a single-directory read.
